chunks.text: Technical Reports - Stavros Tripakis. Hybrid Co-simulation: It's About Time (EECS-2017-6) by Fabio Cremona, Marten Lohstroh, David Broman, Stavros Tripakis, Edward A. Lee and Michael Masin. Requirements for Hybrid Cosimulation (EECS-2014-157) by David Broman, Lev Greenberg, Edward A. Lee, Michael Masin, Stavros Tripakis and Michael Wetter. Viewpoints, Formalisms, Languages, and Tools for Cyber-Physical Systems (EECS-2014-106) by David Broman, Edward A. Lee, Stavros Tripakis and Martin Törngren.

Bridging the Semantic Gap Between Heterogeneous Modeling Formalisms and FMI (EECS-2014-30) by Stavros Tripakis and David Broman. From Relational Interfaces to Assume-Guarantee Contracts (EECS-2014-21) by Pierluigi Nuzzo, Antonio Iannopollo, Stavros Tripakis and Alberto L. Sangiovanni-Vincentelli. Basic Problems in Multi-View Modeling (EECS-2014-4) by Jan Reineke and Stavros Tripakis.

Reactive Synthesis vs. Supervisory Control: Bridging the Gap (EECS-2013-162) by Ruediger Ehlers, Stephane Lafortune, Stavros Tripakis and Moshe Vardi. Determinate Composition of FMUs for Co-Simulation (EECS-2013-153) by David Broman, Christopher Brooks, Lev Greenberg, Edward A. Lee, Michael Masin, Stavros Tripakis and Michael Wetter.
